36839.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 30
36839.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.
